extraction.ocr_text:
INVOICE VS PURCHASE ORDER MATCHING - VALIDATION REQUIRED

Compare    Invoice Original    Purchase Order

Buyer Name    HarbourTech Pty Ltd    HarbourTech Pty Ltd
Buyer Address    88 Eagle St, Brisbane QLD 4000    88 Eagle St, Brisbane QLD 4000 Australia
Buyer Tax ID    AU-73920184566    AU-73920184566
Subtotal    3570.00 SGD    3570.00 SGD
Tax Description    GST 8%    GST 8%
Tax Amount    285.60 SGD    285.60 SGD
Total Amount    3855.60 SGD    3855.60 SGD

Line Items

Description    Quantity    Unit Price    Total
Filing Cabinet    1    200.00 SGD    200.00 SGD
Monitor Arm    1    120.00 SGD    120.00 SGD
Standing Desk    1    850.00 SGD    850.00 SGD
Office Couch    1    2400.00 SGD    2400.00 SGD

Description    Quantity    Unit Price    Total
Filing Cabinet    1    200.00 SGD    200.00 SGD
Gas-spring Monitor Arm    1    120.00 SGD    120.00 SGD
Standing Desk    1    850.00 SGD    850.00 SGD
Sectional Office Coach    1    2400.00 SGD    2400.00 SGD

How to proceed with this Invoice?

Reject
Approve and pay

Rejection notification (autogenerated)

B  I  U  [...]  System Font  12pt  A  [...]

Dear Supplier,

We have reviewed the invoice INV-03055436 against the corresponding purchase order PO-05035482. Unfortunately, we have identified the following discrepancies:

• The description of the item Sectional Office Coach does not match the purchase order, which lists the item as Office Couch.

We kindly request you to adjust the invoice to align with the purchase order and resend it for processing. Thank you for your cooperation.

Best regards,

Payments Team

2026.2
extraction.description: This screenshot shows a UiPath Action App task for human validation of an invoice versus purchase order match. The Compare tab is open, displaying side-by-side invoice and purchase order data with mismatched fields highlighted in red, including a line item discrepancy. Below, the user can choose Reject or Approve and pay, and an autogenerated rejection notification is shown in a rich text editor.
extraction.step_instructions:
1. Review the highlighted mismatches in the Compare tab, especially the discrepant line item values shown in red.
2. Review the autogenerated message in the Rejection notification (autogenerated) editor.
3. Click on Reject if the invoice should be sent back, or click on Approve and pay if the invoice is acceptable despite the differences.
